basic_details.job_title: BSPHCL Audit Advisor cum Financial Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Candidates up to 62 years of age who have experience in Finance/Accounts & Audit Services of State/Central Government or BSPHCL and its subsidiary companies with minimum 20 years of service, or retired from such services, are eligible to apply for these Audit Advisor cum Financial Consultant vacancies. The walk-in interview process for BSPHCL Audit Advisor cum Financial Consultant Recruitment 2026 will be conducted on 13 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 62 years as on 30 April 2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Finance/ Accounts & Audit Services of State/ Central Government or from BSPHCL and its subsidiary companies with minimum 20 years service (deputation basis), Retired from Finance/ Accounts & Audit Services of State/ Central Government or from BSPHCL and its subsidiary companies (contract basis)
qualification.details: For deputation basis: A person from Finance/ Accounts & Audit Services of State/ Central Government or from BSPHCL and its subsidiary companies with a minimum service of 20 years. For Contract basis: A person retired from Finance/ Accounts & Audit Services of State/ Central Government or from BSPHCL and its subsidiary companies.

salary_details.salary_range: Last Pay minus pension as per rules of Govt. of Bihar (retired); pay and emoluments as per previous employer (serving)
salary_details.details: For retired persons: Last Pay minus pension as per the rules applicable by Govt. of Bihar. For serving persons: Pay and emoluments will be fixed as per terms & conditions of the previous employer.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for BSPHCL AUDIT ADVISOR-CUM-FINANCIAL CONSULTANT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the AUDIT ADVISOR-CUM-FINANCIAL CONSULTANT post will be held on 13 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by BSPHCL for this recruitment?
faq.answer: BSPHCL has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the post of AUDIT ADVISOR-CUM-FINANCIAL CONSULTANT in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the AUDIT ADVISOR-CUM-FINANCIAL CONSULTANT post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have a background in Finance/ Accounts & Audit Services from State/ Central Government or BSPHCL and its subsidiary companies. For deputation, a minimum of 20 years of service is required. For contract roles, candidates must be retired from these services.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the AUDIT ADVISOR-CUM-FINANCIAL CONSULTANT position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this position is 62 years as of 30 April 2026. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. How will the salary be determined for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: For retired individuals, the salary will be the Last Pay minus pension as per Bihar Government rules. For serving candidates, the pay and emoluments will be fixed according to their previous employer's terms.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the BSPHCL AUDIT ADVISOR-CUM-FINANCIAL CONSULTANT recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AUDIT ADVISOR-CUM-FINANCIAL CONSULTANT post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Patna, Bihar. The specific venue address will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the AUDIT ADVISOR-CUM-FINANCIAL CONSULTANT position is on a Contract basis.

faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the AUDIT ADVISOR-CUM-FINANCIAL CONSULTANT post will be held on 13 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all required documents.
